stemHtml: In EASA regulatory material, what does "Hard Law" comprise?

options.a: Regulations, Delegated Acts, Implementing Acts, and Implementing Rules.
options.b: Guidance Material, Regulations, Delegated Acts, and Implementing Acts.
options.c: Implementing Rules, Implementing Acts, and Certification Specifications.
options.d: Certification Specifications, AMC, and Guidance Material.
